title: Mrs. O'Malley and Mr. Malone
writer: William Bowers, Craig Rice, Stuart Palmer
actors: Marjorie Main, James Whitmore, Ann Dvorak
plot: A paroled embezzler skips town with his $100K loot and boards the Chicago-New York train, followed by an assortment of shady characters who want the money, but en-route to NYC the embezzler is murdered and his loot disappears.
